title: Clarity
album: Life In Color Vol. 9 (World's Largest Paint Party)
why_this_song: Clarity by Zedd (2012) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 6 times; first heard in: "If our love is tragedy, why are you my remedy?"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "If our love's insanity, why are you my clarity?"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "'Cause we both know how this ends"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "'Cause we both know how this ends"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "If our love is tragedy, why are you my remedy?"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "remedy" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "remedy" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "clarity" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "clarity" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: 'Cause you are the piece of me
'Cause we both know what we'll choose

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Where the past comes back to life
And I'll fall right back to you

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "Clarity" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "Clarity" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "Clarity" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "Clarity" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?

exercises.prompt_en: What kind of person do you imagine the narrator of "Clarity" is? Describe their age, mood, and situation using at least three details from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: Que tipo de pessoa você imagina ser o narrador de "Clarity"? Descreva a idade, o humor e a situação usando pelo menos três detalhes da letra.

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
